steps.title: Set up the sine ratio
steps.content: In a right triangle, $\sin\theta=\dfrac{\text{opposite}}{\text{hypotenuse}}$. From the figure, identify the side opposite the angle marked $x^\circ$ and the hypotenuse, then form that ratio.

steps.title: Evaluate
steps.content: From the figure, the ratio of the opposite side to the hypotenuse evaluates to $0.6956$. So $\sin x^\circ = 0.6956$. The answer is .6956.
